popularStory.headline: Strong, Richard John  story
popularStory.description: When Richard John Strong was born in 1585 in Chard, Somerset, England, his father, George, was 29, and his mother, Ann, was 25. He married Eleanor Deane in 1609 in his hometown. They had nine children …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Strong於大約1585年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈德時，他的父親George Strong30歲，母親Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond27歲。他於1609年與Mrs. John Strong在英國薩默塞特哈德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1613年6月14日在英國薩默塞特哈德享年29歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Strong于大约1585年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈德时，他的父亲George Strong30岁，母亲Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond27岁。他于1609年与Mrs. John Strong在英国薩默塞特哈德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1613年6月14日在英国薩默塞特哈德享年29岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Strong was born about 1585, in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Strong, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, was 27. He married Mrs. John Strong in 1609, in Chard, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 June 1613, in Chard, Somerset, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Strong est né environ 1585, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Strong, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. John Strong en 1609, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1613, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Strong um 1585 in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Strong 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond 27. Er hat 1609 in Chard, Somerset, England Mrs. John Strong geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1613 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Chard, Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Strong è nato il circa 1585 nel Chard, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Strong, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. John Strong nel 1609, nel Chard, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 giugno 1613, nel Chard, Somerset, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Strongが約1585年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャードで生まれた時，父George Strongは30歳，母Elizabeth Mary Ann Bondは27歳であった。1609年にイギリスソメルセトチャードでMrs. John Strongと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1613年6月14日にイギリスソメルセトチャードで29歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Strong(이)가 대략 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Strong(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1609년 영국 서머세트 처드에서 Mrs. John Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1613년 6월 14일 영국 서머세트 처드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Strong nasceu aproximadamente 1585, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Strong, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. John Strong em 1609, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1613, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Strong родился около 1585 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Strong было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. John Strong в 1609 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 июня 1613 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Strong nació aproximadamente 1585, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George Strong, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mary Ann Bond, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mrs. John Strong en 1609, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de junio de 1613, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra.
